sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6746" key="a)nakna/ptw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνακνάπτω</orth>, <sense id="n6746.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make</tr_> old clothes <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fresh by fulling:</tr_> metaph., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀ. τὰς ἀλλοτρίας ἐπινοίας</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">vamp</tr_> them <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">up as new,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0472.tlg001:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Lysipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
